title: Read-only repository-family intake

inputs.name: WorkspaceRoot
inputs.description: Parent directory containing sibling local clones. Defaults to the parent of the AgentSwitchboard checkout.

inputs.name: OutputRoot
inputs.description: Untracked output directory. Defaults to the operating-system temporary directory.

steps: Resolve and verify the AgentSwitchboard repository root.
Load the exact four-repository family registry.
Find local clones by registered directory names without cloning or fetching.
Inspect Git identity, branch, HEAD, dirty state, and required harness paths read-only.
Classify each repository as ready, partial, blocked, or not_present.
Emit run context, machine-readable status, English operator report, and compressed final handoff.
Return exact validator or clone commands without executing child validators.
stopConditions: The registry is malformed or does not contain exactly the supported four repositories.
The requested output directory is inside any inspected repository.
The AgentSwitchboard checkout cannot be identified safely.
proofCeiling: Local clone presence, Git identity, current local branch and HEAD, dirty-state observation, and required-path readiness only. No child validation, network freshness, provider, runtime, merge, deployment, or product proof.
